About RePass Cloud

We build enterprise software that can be operated, governed, and trusted.

RePass Cloud is an engineering-led company focused on software systems for teams working across cloud estates, identity-heavy workflows, and operational environments where reliability matters.

Talk to us See case studies
What we are not

Not a brochure agency. Not a staffing pass-through.

We are a technical delivery team that designs and ships enterprise systems where identity, controls, integration, and support all have to work together in production.

Primary focus
Multi-tenant enterprise platforms
Cloud governance and FinOps tooling
Microsoft 365 and Entra identity automation
Workflow and approval automation
PowerShell delivery and operational tooling
Integration-heavy business systems
Operating principles

How we execute

Engineering before presentation

We start with system behavior, control points, and integration realities before visual polish or documentation layers.

Governance as a design input

Auditability, permissions, evidence trails, and supportability are part of architecture decisions from the start.

Modernization without fantasy assumptions

We design for the enterprise you have now, including legacy systems and hybrid constraints, not a fictional clean slate.

Flagship product

Cinturon360

Cinturon360 reflects our product standard: multi-tenant architecture, identity-aware controls, delegated administration, and full auditability for operationally serious teams.

Visit Cinturon360
Identity-aware control software
Multi-tenant · Audit-ready · Delegated admin
Contact

Need a technical partner who can work through complexity, not around it?

Send us the workflow, control issue, or integration bottleneck. We will start there.

Start the conversation Contact page
RePass Cloud

Enterprise software and cloud automation.

Built in Sydney for teams operating across Azure, AWS, and Microsoft 365.

EU/UK visitors: we need your consent before analytics runs. California residents have the right to opt out of the sale or sharing of personal information. Learn more
